title: k8s-debug-pod values
description: Configurable Helm values for the k8s-debug-pod chart.

replicaCount.description: Number of debug pod replicas to run.

image.description: Container image settings for the debug container.

repository.description: Container image repository used for the debug container.

tag.description: Container image tag to deploy. Pin this to a concrete version for repeatable debugging environments.

pullPolicy.description: Kubernetes image pull policy for the debug container.

imagePullSecrets.description: Optional list of image pull secrets used when the container image is stored in a private registry.

nameOverride.description: Override the chart name portion used when generating Kubernetes resource names.

fullnameOverride.description: Override the full generated Kubernetes resource name.

podAnnotations.description: Additional annotations applied to debug pods.

podLabels.description: Additional labels applied to debug pods.

podSecurityContext.description: Pod-level security context applied to the debug pod.

securityContext.description: Container-level security context for the debug container.

allowPrivilegeEscalation.description: Whether the debug container can gain additional privileges.

capabilities.description: Linux capabilities added to or dropped from the debug container.

add.description: Linux capabilities added to the debug container.

drop.description: Linux capabilities dropped from the debug container.

serviceAccount.description: ServiceAccount configuration for in-cluster Kubernetes API access.

create.description: Create a ServiceAccount for the debug pod.

annotations.description: Additional annotations applied to the ServiceAccount.

name.description: ServiceAccount name override. When empty, the chart fullname is used if serviceAccount.create is true.

rbac.description: RBAC configuration for the debug pod ServiceAccount.

create.description: Create a ClusterRoleBinding for the debug pod ServiceAccount.

clusterRoleName.description: ClusterRole bound to the debug pod ServiceAccount.

command.description: Optional command override for the debug container entrypoint.

args.description: Optional argument override for the debug container command.

env.description: Non-secret environment variables passed to the debug container.

envFrom.description: Additional envFrom sources, such as ConfigMaps or Secrets, added to the debug container.

resources.description: CPU and memory requests and limits for the debug container.

extraVolumes.description: Additional Kubernetes volumes appended to the pod spec.

extraVolumeMounts.description: Additional volume mounts appended to the debug container.

nodeSelector.description: Node selector constraints for scheduling pods onto matching nodes.

tolerations.description: Pod tolerations that allow scheduling onto tainted nodes.

affinity.description: Pod affinity and anti-affinity rules for advanced scheduling control.
